# Osaka Hoso Co., Ltd. (大阪放送株式会社)

> Founded in 1945 as a steel company in Osaka, Japan. Now an AI/DX transformation company.

## What we do

Osaka Hoso transforms mid-market companies' back-office operations using AI. Our three services:

1. **AI Accounting System** — Replace people-dependent accounting with an AI-powered system, end to end. Eligible for Japan's Digital / AI Adoption Subsidy (50%, up to ¥4.5 million).
2. **AI Skills Training** — Hands-on corporate training for ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini. 2 days, 11 hours. Up to 75% subsidized for SMEs via Japan's Human Resources Development Subsidy.
3. **Monthly Accounting BPO** — Ongoing monthly operations with CFO-level engagement. From ¥250,000/month.

## Our proof

We walked into Radio Osaka (OBC) — a broadcaster we invested in, on the air since 1958 — and rebuilt it with AI:
- 2,500–3,000 journal entries per month, processed automatically by AI
- Every paper voucher and approval stamp eliminated
- AI announcer (Benten Obi) and AI broadcast summary (Daily Radio Osaka) deployed

## Key people

- **Yorihiko Kato** — Representative Director. 4th-generation leader. Angel investor who backed 80+ startups across Asia. Changed the company name from Maruichi Kosan to Osaka Hoso.
- **Kengo Kitaura** — Director. Founded AGRIBUDDY (agri-fintech) in Cambodia. Designed and built OBC's AI transformation.

## Company facts

- Founded: October 1, 1945 (as Maruichi Shokai)
- Incorporated: December 17, 1948 (as Maruichi Kosan Co., Ltd.)
- Renamed: May 20, 2026 (to Osaka Hoso Co., Ltd.)
- HQ: Tsuneyoshi, Konohana-ku, Osaka, Japan
- Website: https://osakahoso.com
- Languages: Japanese, English

## Links

- Japanese site: https://osakahoso.com/
- English site: https://osakahoso.com/en/

- Radio Osaka (OBC): https://www.obc1314.co.jp/

## コラム / Insights (JP)

Field notes from Kengo Kitaura (Director), based on the actual rebuild of Radio Osaka (OBC) with AI.

- [計器類のない車を走らせていた放送局を、AIで丸ごと作り替えた話](https://osakahoso.com/column/obc-case-study): 1958年開局のラジオ大阪に経営陣として入り込み、30年分211万行のデータをAIで処理して紙の伝票を全廃するまでの現場記録。誤差0.01%。
- [AIで経理を自動化して分かった、AIの「最後の20%」問題](https://osakahoso.com/column/ai-last-20-percent): AIは80%まで驚くほど速いが、残り20%で「存在しない問題」を作り出す。同じ失敗を100倍速で繰り返す。鍵は「川上の設計」を人間がやること。
- [なぜ「古い会社」ほどAIで劇的に変わるのか](https://osakahoso.com/column/old-companies-ai): カンボジアの農村と昭和33年創業の放送局——課題の構造は同じ。デジタルから最も遠い現場こそ、AIで最も大きく変わる。

## Columns / Insights (EN)

Field notes by Kengo Kitaura (Director, Osaka Hoso Co., Ltd.), based on the actual rebuild of Radio Osaka (OBC) with AI.

- [How We Rebuilt a 1958 Broadcaster's Entire Accounting System with AI](https://osakahoso.com/en/column/obc-case-study): Inside the rebuild of Radio Osaka (OBC), a broadcaster we invested in. Thirty years and 2.11 million rows of journal data processed by AI with 0.01% variance, every paper voucher and approval stamp eliminated.
- [What We Learned Automating Accounting with AI: The "Last 20%" Problem](https://osakahoso.com/en/column/ai-last-20-percent): AI is incredible up to 80%. The last 20% is where it invents problems that don't exist and repeats the same mistake at 100x speed. Why upstream design by humans is non-negotiable.
- [Why "Old Companies" Benefit Most from AI](https://osakahoso.com/en/column/old-companies-ai): Cambodian farming villages and a broadcaster founded in 1958 — structurally the same problem. The further from digital the operation is, the bigger the room for AI to change it.
